name: jdtls-mcp-wrapper
description: Expose Eclipse JDT.LS Java navigation as MCP tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Java LSP navigation tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Starts Eclipse JDT.LS behind an MCP stdio server and exposes Java navigation, readiness status, and diagnostics tools.
defaultPrompt: Use JDT.LS to find a Java symbol definition
Find implementations and references for this Java method
List document symbols for a Java file
